ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., TSLA, AAPL) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the stock */,
  "stock_type" TEXT /* Type of stock (e.g., common, preferred) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the stock belongs to */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the stock belongs to */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* IPO date of the stock */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price entry */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* High price of the stock */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Low price of the stock */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend paid */,
  "split" REAL /* Split ratio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the watchlist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the watchlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the watchlist */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Whether the watchlist is publicly accessible */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlist_stocks" (
  "watchlist_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist-stock entry */,
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the watchlist */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date the stock was added to the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_stocks_watchlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("watchlist_id") REFERENCES watchlists ("watchlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition for the alert (e.g., price above, volume below) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the condition */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method for notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the alert is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_logs" (
  "alert_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert log entry */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert */,
  "trigger_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was triggered */,
  "trigger_value" REAL /* Value that triggered the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_logs_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the technical indicator (e.g., moving average, RSI) */,
  "value" REAL /* Calculated value of the indicator */,
  "calculation_date" TEXT /* Date the indicator was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst rating */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Name of the analyst */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the analyst (e.g., buy, hold, sell) */,
  "target_price" REAL /* Target price set by the analyst */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_ratings_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
